title: ermania stewartii
side_effects: Ermania stewartii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal problems. In some cases, consuming the plant's extracts can lead to dizziness, headaches, and nausea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also cause liver damage and kidney failure, which may be irreversible. Furthermore, improper use of Ermania stewartii can interact with other medications, resulting in adverse effects such as increased blood pressure and heart rate.
